name: Managing your personal access tokens - GitHub Docs
snippet: Personal access tokens are an alternative to using passwords for authentication to GitHub when using the GitHub API or the command line.

name: Git push HTTPS with Personal access token asking for password

name: Can't push to my own github repo via cmd line. I've created  - Reddit

name: Chapter 9 Personal access token for HTTPS
snippet: 9 Personal access token for HTTPS. When we interact with a remote Git server, such as GitHub, we have to include credentials in the request.
